overall.description: A first-person perspective video from a bus simulator game showing a player walking around a Berlin city bus during heavy rain. The player approaches from the front, moves along the right side over wet cobblestones, and boards the vehicle through the front entrance.

scene_state.functional_zone: urban bus station with cobblestone pavement

events.description: white coach bus visible in background moving left to right behind the main bus

agents.ego_description: walking from the front of the bus toward the right side along the wet cobblestone street

entered.detail: dark blue MAN city bus with red be Berlin livery, rain-covered windshield and windows
wet cobblestone ground with rain puddles and reflective surfaces
lush green deciduous trees lining the background street
white intercity coach parked in the background lot

segments.scene_description: The scene opens with a first-person view facing the front of a Berlin city bus during heavy rainfall. The player walks along the right side of the vehicle across wet cobblestones, with a white coach bus visible in the background and green trees lining the street.

agents.ego_description: continuing along the right side of the bus toward the front entrance door

entered.detail: glass double doors with yellow safety markings and handrails visible inside

segments.scene_description: Moving closer to the bus, the camera focuses on the front entrance door on the right side. The surrounding trees and distant vehicles exit the frame as the player approaches the boarding area, with the bus now filling the left side of the view.

scene_state.functional_zone: bus interior entrance and driver cabin area

events.description: bus front doors open automatically allowing entry into the vehicle interior
transition from rainy natural exterior lighting to dim artificial interior lighting

agents.ego_description: stepping through the front entrance doors onto the bus and entering the interior space

entered.detail: enclosed interior space with dark flooring, yellow handrails, and fare gate
enclosed driver's compartment with controls and windshield visible ahead

segments.scene_description: The bus doors open and the camera enters the vehicle interior. The scene transitions from the rainy cobblestone exterior to the dimly lit entrance area with yellow handrails and the driver cabin visible to the left, marking a clear shift from outdoor to indoor environment.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person movement from a rain-soaked city street into the sheltered interior of a Berlin city bus. It begins facing the front of the vehicle during heavy rainfall, moving along the right side across wet cobblestones with green trees and a white coach bus visible in the background. As the camera draws closer to the boarding area, the surrounding street scenery and distant vehicles fade from view while the bus expands to fill the left side of the frame. The scene then shifts abruptly as the doors open, transitioning from the gray, rainy exterior into the dimly lit entrance. Finally, the camera enters the vehicle, revealing yellow handrails and the driver's cabin to the left.
